objective: Create a low-latency distilled trading model specialized for MES/MNQ/MYM/ES futures execution, meta-reasoning, emotional-bias correction, and post-trade reflection.

training_goal.latency_priority: sub-250ms local inference for reasoning path

datasets.name: trade_history
datasets.description: Historical live and simulated trade actions, fills, pnl, regime context, and execution outcomes.

datasets.name: reflections
datasets.description: Thought traces, self-critique, emotional twin corrections, and meta reasoning summaries.

datasets.name: state_snapshots
datasets.description: Engine state, dream snapshots, equity curves, and regime memory.

datasets.name: infinite_sim_data
datasets.description: Synthetic regime stress tests, walk-forward outcomes, and reinforcement-style signal quality labels.

datasets.name: swarm_context
datasets.source: swarm snapshots and cross-symbol correlation/allocation logs
datasets.description: Multi-symbol regime consensus, allocation decisions, arbitrage context, and cross-asset signals.

input_schema.instruction: Trading decision request or reflection task

preprocessing_requirements: Normalize all outputs to strict JSON assistant responses
Mask secrets, API keys, account identifiers, and webhook URLs
Map failed trades to reflection labels and emotional-bias labels
Attach regime, swarm, and RL metadata to each example where available
Create separate splits for decision-making, reflection, and meta-reasoning
distillation_targets: Match Grok-4 style reasoning quality on trade decisions
Preserve concise reasoning and structured JSON compliance
Prefer fast-path compatible outputs with stable confidence calibration
Learn from winning and losing trades, not just high-confidence examples

offline_metrics: Signal agreement with accepted historical decisions
online_shadow_mode: Compare against Ollama and remote Grok fallback decisions
Track disagreement rate and pnl delta in paper mode
Promote only after stable shadow performance

requested_deliverables: Fine-tuned distilled checkpoint or hosted custom model
Inference prompt template optimized for strict JSON trading outputs
Recommended decoding params for low-latency futures trading
Best-practice deployment guidance for vLLM and fallback routing
notes: This request is for a private trading assistant model specialized on proprietary trade history, reflections, and simulation outputs. Data should be handled as confidential proprietary material.
